name: hyperflow
description: Autonomous orchestration for Codex App and CLI. Thinking models plan, triage, and review; worker models execute fast; every chain keeps project memory local.

interface.shortDescription: Orchestrate Codex tasks with memory, routing, and review
interface.longDescription: Hyperflow adds a structured engineering workflow to Codex App and CLI: intent routing, task decomposition, thinking-tier review, fast worker execution, persistent project memory, security guardrails, and release gates.
defaultPrompt: Use Hyperflow to scope this feature
